description: SelectPdf provides PDF generation and processing tools for developers, including a hosted REST API and self-hosted .NET PDF libraries. Its online service converts HTML or URLs to PDF and also supports PDF merging and PDF text extraction.
summary: SelectPdf exposes a hosted REST API for HTML-to-PDF conversion, PDF merge, PDF-to-text extraction, async job polling, and related usage endpoints, plus a public unauthenticated demo conversion endpoint; authentication for production is a SelectPdf API key sent as the `key` request parameter.
